user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Samsung
Product type: Galaxy S25 Ultra smartphone
Tone: innovative, premium, cutting-edge
Visual style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Pixel Perfect Evolution
brief.caption: A futuristic cityscape reflected in the ultra-clear lens of the Galaxy S25 Ultra, showcasing its advanced camera capabilities. The scene is filled with vibrant colors and intricate details captured in a single shot, highlighting the phone's superior imaging technology.
brief.visual_style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features.
brief.call_to_action: Explore the Future with Galaxy S25 Ultra
brief.typography_style: Modern sans-serif with a sleek, condensed form to convey sophistication
brief.color_scheme: midnight black, electric blue, and tech silver
